tosca_definitions_version: tosca_simple_yaml_1_3
description: Architecture for deploying a Java application named Alien with an embedded
  Tomcat server, connected to an Elasticsearch instance. Both components are hosted
  on separate Linux virtual machines with specified resources and connected to the
  same IPv4 network.
node_types:
  computeWithblocNetwork:
    derived_from: tosca.nodes.Compute
    requirements:
    - network_link:
        capability: tosca.capabilities.network.Linkable
        node: tosca.nodes.network.Network
        occurrences:
        - 1
        - UNBOUNDED
    - bloc_attachement:
        capability: tosca.capabilities.Attachment
        node: tosca.nodes.Storage.BlockStorage
        occurrences:
        - 1
        - UNBOUNDED
  computeWithnetwork:
    derived_from: tosca.nodes.Compute
    requirements:
    - network_link:
        capability: tosca.capabilities.network.Linkable
        node: tosca.nodes.network.Network
        occurrences:
        - 1
        - UNBOUNDED
  computeWithblocStorage:
    derived_from: tosca.nodes.Compute
    requirements:
    - bloc_attachement:
        capability: tosca.capabilities.Attachment
        node: tosca.nodes.Storage.BlockStorage
        occurrences:
        - 1
        - UNBOUNDED
  WebAppWithDatabase:
    derived_from: WebApplication
    requirements:
    - database_connection:
        capability: tosca.capabilities.Endpoint.Database
        node: Database
        occurrences:
        - 1
        - UNBOUNDED
  WebAppWithObjStorage:
    derived_from: WebApplication
    requirements:
    - object_connection:
        capability: tosca.capabilities.Endpoint
        node: tosca.nodes.Storage.ObjectStorage
        occurrences:
        - 1
        - UNBOUNDED
  WebAppWithObjBDD:
    derived_from: WebApplication
    requirements:
    - database_connection:
        capability: tosca.capabilities.Endpoint.Database
        node: Database
        occurrences:
        - 1
        - UNBOUNDED
    - object_connection:
        capability: tosca.capabilities.Endpoint
        node: tosca.nodes.Storage.ObjectStorage
        occurrences:
        - 1
        - UNBOUNDED
  StorageForContainer:
    derived_from: tosca.nodes.Storage.ObjectStorage
    capabilities:
      storage:
        type: tosca.capabilities.Storage
  RuntimeForContainer:
    derived_from: tosca.nodes.Container.Runtime
    capabilities:
      host:
        type: tosca.capabilities.Compute
  NetworkForContainer:
    derived_from: tosca.nodes.network.Network
    capabilities:
      network:
        type: tosca.capabilities.Network
  ContainerWithDatabase:
    derived_from: tosca.nodes.Container.Application
    requirements:
    - database_connection:
        capability: tosca.capabilities.Endpoint.Database
        node: Database
        occurrences:
        - 1
        - UNBOUNDED
data_types:
  acme.datatypes.Location:
    derived_from: tosca.datatypes.Root
    description: 'A deployment location: region and/or availability zone.'
    properties:
      region:
        type: string
        required: false
      availability_zone:
        type: string
        required: false
policy_types:
  acme.policies.Placement:
    derived_from: tosca.policies.Placement
    description: Geographic placement constraint (region and/or availability zone).
    properties:
      locations:
        type: list
        required: true
        entry_schema:
          type: acme.datatypes.Location
      distribution:
        type: string
        default: multi_region
        constraints:
        - valid_values:
          - single_region
          - multi_region
  acme.policies.Availability:
    derived_from: tosca.policies.Performance
    description: Service-level availability target (percent).
    properties:
      availability:
        type: float
        required: true
        constraints:
        - in_range:
          - 0.0
          - 100.0
  acme.policies.Latency:
    derived_from: tosca.policies.Performance
    description: Maximum tolerated network latency.
    properties:
      max_latency:
        type: scalar-unit.time
        required: true
        constraints:
        - greater_than: 0 ms
  acme.policies.Cost:
    derived_from: tosca.policies.Root
    description: Budget constraint over a billing period.
    properties:
      max_cost:
        type: float
        required: true
      currency:
        type: string
        default: USD
        constraints:
        - valid_values:
          - USD
          - EUR
          - GBP
      period:
        type: string
        default: monthly
        constraints:
        - valid_values:
          - hourly
          - daily
          - monthly
          - yearly
topology_template:
  node_templates:
    alien_application:
      type: WebApplication
      properties:
        context_root: /alien
      capabilities:
        app_endpoint:
          properties:
            protocol: http
            port: 8080
            secure: false
            url_path: /alien
      requirements:
      - host: tomcat_server
      - dependency: elasticsearch_component
    tomcat_server:
      type: WebServer
      requirements:
      - host: vm_alien
    vm_alien:
      type: computeWithnetwork
      capabilities:
        host:
          properties:
            name: vm_alien
            num_cpus: 3
            disk_size: 20 GB
            mem_size: 4 GB
        os:
          properties:
            architecture: x86_64
            type: linux
            distribution: ubuntu
            version: '20.04'
        scalable:
          properties:
            min_instances: 1
            max_instances: 1
            default_instances: 1
        endpoint:
          properties:
            protocol: ssh
            port: 22
            secure: true
      requirements:
      - network_link: ipv4_network
    elasticsearch_component:
      type: SoftwareComponent
      properties:
        component_version: 8.12.0
      requirements:
      - host: vm_elasticsearch
    vm_elasticsearch:
      type: computeWithnetwork
      capabilities:
        host:
          properties:
            name: vm_elasticsearch
            num_cpus: 3
            disk_size: 10 GB
            mem_size: 2 GB
        os:
          properties:
            architecture: x86_64
            type: linux
            distribution: ubuntu
            version: '20.04'
        scalable:
          properties:
            min_instances: 1
            max_instances: 1
            default_instances: 1
        endpoint:
          properties:
            protocol: ssh
            port: 22
            secure: true
      requirements:
      - network_link: ipv4_network
    jdk_alien:
      type: SoftwareComponent
      properties:
        component_version: 17.0.10
      requirements:
      - host: vm_alien
    jdk_elasticsearch:
      type: SoftwareComponent
      properties:
        component_version: 17.0.10
      requirements:
      - host: vm_elasticsearch
    ipv4_network:
      type: Network
      properties:
        ip_version: 4
      capabilities:
        link: {}

conflicts.explanation: A single criterion blocks: relaxing it is enough.

relaxations.cible: vm_host (compute) — No cloud provider offers a virtual machine with 60 GB of memory, which is required for your Docker host.
relaxations.action: Reduce memory requirement: Lower the memory requirement for the virtual machine from 60 GB to **32 GB** (the maximum available in the catalog).
relaxations.explanation: Your Docker host will have less memory available, which may limit the performance or number of containers it can run simultaneously. However, this is the only way to proceed with the current cloud provider options.

relaxations.cible: vm_host (compute) — No cloud provider offers a virtual machine with 60 GB of memory, which is required for your Docker host.
relaxations.action: Switch to a provider with higher memory offerings: Explore alternative cloud providers or specialized instances that offer virtual machines with **60 GB or more of memory**. This may require additional research or contacting providers directly.
relaxations.explanation: Switching providers may introduce additional costs, complexity, or changes to your deployment workflow. However, it ensures your Docker host has the required memory for optimal performance.

relaxations.explanation: You gain access to real offers for block storage, but the storage volume will be 24 GB smaller than originally requested. If 1000 GB is sufficient for your needs, this is a viable trade-off.
